title: Kanban board report
description: Data contract for the kanban-board format: a work-surface board with fixed-width stage lanes, compact cards, WIP limits, optional swimlane grouping, and tri-state status semantics. Lanes run left-to-right as delivery stages (Backlog → Done); cards are the items flowing through them. Renders to a self-contained, themeable, interactive HTML board. The sample's #report-data is a valid instance of this schema.

meta.description: Shared report chrome (org / project / title / theme). Brand-neutral: use real or brand-neutral values (e.g. Independent Research / Open Research / Research Desk); never leave a {{...}} placeholder.

reportType.description: Eyebrow label shown in the board bar (e.g. 'Sprint 24').

title.description: Board name shown in the board bar, e.g. 'Delivery & Defect Board'.

subtitle.description: Optional sub-label shown below the board name, e.g. the sprint or date range.

date.description: ISO date the board was generated (YYYY-MM-DD).

theme.description: Initial brand theme; applied as <html data-theme>. The in-board switcher can change it live. Default for this format is 'teal'.

lanes.description: The ordered delivery stages, rendered as fixed-width columns left to right. 3–6 lanes is the comfortable range; the board scrolls horizontally beyond that.

id.description: Stable unique lane key used on each card's `lane` field. e.g. 'backlog', 'in-progress', 'done'.

name.description: Lane display name shown in the sticky lane header, e.g. 'In progress'.

wipLimit.description: Optional WIP cap. When the card count in this lane reaches or exceeds wipLimit the WIP indicator turns 'risk'. Omit to disable WIP display for this lane.

isDone.description: If true, this is the terminal 'Done' lane — rendered with subtle de-emphasis (.lane--done). At most one lane should set this.

swimlanes.description: Optional horizontal grouping bands. When present, the board repeats the full lane set once per swimlane. Useful for splitting Mobile vs Core-banking work on the same board. Omit for a flat board.

id.description: Stable unique swimlane key used on each card's `swimlane` field.

name.description: Swimlane display label, e.g. 'Mobile app' or 'Core banking'.

cards.description: All work items on the board, each placed in one lane (and optionally one swimlane). Render order within a lane is the order they appear here.

id.description: Displayed card ID (shown in the .kc-id chip), e.g. 'DEF-2241' or 'GEN-1160'. Must be unique.

title.description: Card title shown as the main text, max ~2 lines. e.g. 'Fix rounding on FX conversion preview'.

lane.description: ID of the lane this card belongs to. Must match one of the `lanes[].id` values.

swimlane.description: Optional ID of the swimlane group this card belongs to. Must match one of the `swimlanes[].id` values when swimlanes are defined.

status.description: Card semantic state. 'ok' = on track / in progress (brand/ok edge); 'risk' = blocked or overdue (bordeaux edge); 'hold' = watch / aging / WIP-at-limit (amber edge).

cardType.description: Optional type label shown in the .kcard-tag pill, e.g. 'Story', 'Defect', 'Chore'. No constraint on values.

assignee.description: Optional assignee display name used to render the .avatar initials disc, e.g. 'Aisha Rahman'.

tags.description: Optional list of label tag strings shown as .mchip pills, e.g. ['ledger', 'payments-api'].

due.description: Optional due date (ISO YYYY-MM-DD or a short display label like 'Jun 25'). Rendered as a clock .mchip; a past date flips the chip to 'hold'/'risk' tone.

points.description: Optional story-point estimate shown as a .mchip pts chip, e.g. 5.

blocked.description: If true, this card is flagged blocked: risk-coloured left edge + a visible .block-flag reason row. Should match status:'risk'.

blockReason.description: Short reason text shown in the .block-flag row when blocked=true, e.g. 'Waiting for security sign-off'.

prRef.description: Optional pull-request or code reference shown as a .mchip, e.g. 'PR #884'.

cards.title: Push-notification opt-in prompt on first open
Passcode entry loops after three failed attempts on Android 14
Biometric fallback unavailable after iOS background wipe
cards.blockReason: Waiting for iOS SDK clarification from vendor

cards.title: Fix logout not clearing cached biometric token
Idempotency key validation on payment initiation endpoint
Prevent negative available-balance display during pending holds
